response:
Alex reads books.
Books hold stories.
Stories show love.
Love changes minds.
Minds seek truth.
Truth needs time.
Time passes fast.
Fast days count.
Count pages now.
Now count days.
Days bring change.
Change starts slow.
Slow growth helps.
Helps build trust.
Trust grows deep.
Deep thoughts form.
Form new ideas.
Ideas break walls.
Walls block views.
Views shift wide.
Wide paths open.
Open doors lead.
Lead to light.
Light shines bright.
Bright sun warms.
Warms cold hearts.
Hearts beat strong.
Strong bonds form.
Form lasting peace.
Peace brings calm.
Calm minds think.
Think clear logic.
Logic proves facts.
Facts show math.
Math adds up.
Up comes ten.
Ten pages daily.
